prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Renji Dawnblade in a crimson guild cloak and Mika Ashbell in a short guild cloak and bright scarf; Renji points to a specific location on a weathered quest map pinned to the wooden guild board, Mika leans in to examine the missing caravan route with a focused expression, cinematic lighting, anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; after ten seconds Mika nods firmly and traces the path on the map with her finger, Renji smiles confidently and places a hand on his broadsword hilt, they share a look of determined resolve and prepare to depart for the quest, consistent identities and camera, no text, no watermark.
